name: Exopharm Limited
summary: Exopharm Limited, a biopharmaceutical company, focuses on developing and commercializing human therapeutics using extracellular vesicles (EVs) as medicines in Australia. The company is developing Na√É¬Øve EVs as regenerative medicines, including Plexaris for wound healing; and Cevaris used in inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and tissue remodeling activities. Its Engineered EVs products comprise Fortrexo CoV, an engineered EV product that reduce the duration and severity of SARS-CoV-2 infection in the early phase of a patient's exposure to COVID-19; and Plexodox, a platelet derived EV loaded with the approved anti-cancer drug doxorubicin as a novel and improved anticancer drug. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia.
